title: Rich Roasted Creamy Australian Chive Dip Bake
description: A comforting, umami-rich dip bake featuring a chive sour cream topping and a crunchy tadka crust, perfect for low-carb snacking or as a side dish.

ingredients.name: 1 cup grated cheddar cheese
ingredients.notes: low-carb option: use cheddar cheese with 30% less carbs

instructions: In a clay tandoor pot or a small baking dish, combine the onion and garlic.
Drizzle with 1 tablespoon of olive oil and roast in the oven for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
In a small bowl, mix together the sour cream, chive dip, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the sour cream mixture over the roasted onion mixture in the clay tandoor pot or baking dish.
Top with the grated cheddar cheese and drizzle with the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil.
Mix the tadka topping ingredients (see below) and sprinkle over the top of the cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.

Tadka topping: In a small pan, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat. Add 1/4 cup of chopped fresh chives and 1/4 cup of grated cheddar cheese. Cook, stirring constantly, until the cheese is melted and the chives are crispy.
Tadka topping: Sprinkle the tadka topping over the top of the dip bake and serve immediately.
